message.content:
Hello! 👋

I don't have access to the current time, so I can't tell you exactly what time it is right now. But I'm here and ready to help you with whatever you need!

Is there something I can assist you with today?
message.name: MiniMax AI
message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to say hello and tell them the current time. I don't have real-time access to the current time, so I'll let them know I can't provide the exact current time.

Let me just be friendly and greet them!
